channel.title: Recipe Ideas from DreamRoomDecor.github.io/recipes
channel.description: A collection of delicious recipe ideas.

item.title: Legendary Crockpot Yogurt Recipe
item.description: This 5-ingredient Crockpot Yogurt Recipe recipe is a lifesaver on busy days. Quick, simple, and oh-so-good. Save this pin for later! #5ingredients #quickandeasy #busymom #mealplan #simplerecipes
